---
title: "Vitor Theodoro Oliveira Viana"
image: "logo_2.png"
links:
  - label: GitHub
    url: "https://github.com/VitorTheo"
  - label: Email
    url: "vitor.theodoro1897@gmail.com"
  - label: Relatórios
    url: "./relatorio/index.html"
  - label: LinkedIn
    url: "https://www.linkedin.com/in/vitor-theodoro-oliveira-viana-2219761b0/"
output:
  postcards::jolla
---
 
Descrição sobre o aluno(a)!
